briefdescription.para: This is the scale factor to scale the input image. The processing will happen on the scaled down image The topics and the output coordinates will correspond to the scaled image size.
Callback for set parameter event, here the parameter struct is copied, the actual values get updated in the process loop.
updates the parameter of input image based on dynamic reconfigure.
This image fills and publishes the camera information.

memberdef.argsstring: (const cv::Mat &img, const std::string &encoding_type, const std::string &frame_id, rclcpp::Publisher< sensor_msgs::msg::Image >::SharedPtr publisher)
memberdef.name: publishImageAsRosMsg

briefdescription.para: This function publishes images as Ros messages.

parameterdescription.para: number of bits used to represent one pixel of image.

briefdescription.para: This function publishes the point cloud.

detaileddescription.para: Note: Assumes that cam_info_msg_ is already populated

briefdescription.para: This function publishes the images as Ros message.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the output frame containing the compressed depth frame and its size.

memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned char *compressed_img, int compressed_img_size, const std::string &encoding_type, const std::string &frame_id, const rclcpp::Publisher< sensor_msgs::msg::CompressedImage >::SharedPtr publisher)
memberdef.name: publishRVLCompressedImageAsRosMsg

briefdescription.para: This function publishes a compressed image as Ros message.
This is main class for this package.
